Chain Pop!

Chain Pop! is a colorful puzzle game where you connect adjacent balls of the same color to clear them from the grid. Your goal is to complete level objectives by clearing specific numbers of colored balls and reaching target scores within a limited number of moves. Chain longer sequences for bigger bonus points! Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels with expanding grids, more colors, and strategic obstacles. Plan your moves carefully to achieve victory!

ENTER: Start the game from the title screen
ARROW KEYS: Navigate the grid (visual cursor feedback)
SPACE: Select/confirm ball to start chain, or use booster on selected position
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart and return to title screen
Z: Activate bomb booster (clears 3x3 area around selected ball)

<hard_constraints>

Chain Pop!

Chain Pop! is a colorful puzzle game where you connect adjacent balls of the same color to clear them from the grid. Your goal is to complete level objectives by clearing specific numbers of colored balls and reaching target scores within a limited number of moves. Chain longer sequences for bigger bonus points! Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels with expanding grids, more colors, and strategic obstacles. Plan your moves carefully to achieve victory!

ENTER: Start the game from the title screen
ARROW KEYS: Navigate the grid (visual cursor feedback)
SPACE: Select/confirm ball to start chain, or use booster on selected position
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart and return to title screen
Z: Activate bomb booster (clears 3x3 area around selected ball)
